allow: PowerShell($tools = @\('gofmt','go','gopls'\); foreach \($t in $tools\) { $cmd = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "$t -> $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "$t -> NOT FOUND" } }; "---"; $userTools = @\('golint','staticcheck','golangci-lint'\); foreach \($t in $userTools\) { $cmd = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "$t -> $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "$t -> NOT FOUND" } })
